creator: sasamotikomi@gmail.com
text:
Starting I2P Service...
Waiting for I2P Service..................................................................
WARNING: I2P Service may have failed to start.
**Failed to load the wrapper**

The current version of the Tanuki wrapper does not
support FreeBSD 10.

See https://trac.i2p2.de/ticket/1118 for more information
and a workaround for this issue.

In the meantime, you may start I2P by running the script
/home/{myuser}/i2p/runplain.sh

Mostly problems already fixed with last wrapper version:  
http://sourceforge.net/p/wrapper/bugs/283/
http://sourceforge.net/p/wrapper/bugs/286/
